name: Non-Application Layer Protocol C2
description: Detects potential C2 using ICMP or other non-standard protocols for covert communication
query:
// Detect ICMP tunneling or unusual protocol usage
// Trigger on excessive ICMP traffic to a single destination
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "ICMP"
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 50
within 300 seconds
